narrative: Iran-Strait of Hormuz tensions set up risk-off for the Tokyo open, likely to sustain crude bid and support CAD, AUD. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold on April 30 removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 159.33; BoJ meeting on April 28 may see hawkish surprise, which would pressure USD/JPY from current levels.
